goals.title: Implement the previously verified Skim work end-to-end through M5: An...
goals.objective: Implement the previously verified Skim work end-to-end through M5: Android direct audio recording with runtime permission, start/stop/file upload UI; asynchronous server processing with Android polling, failure and retry; Media3 play/pause/progress/duration controls with timestamp seek/autoplay; automated Range 206 E2E coverage; Android tests for upload, polling, seek, and permission flow; and correct Android/server documentation. Preserve existing user changes; do not commit without approval.

Replace via revise_criterion with regression proof for neighboring behavior after: Implement the previously verified Skim work end-to-end through M5: Android di....

codexObjective: Complete the durable ulw-loop plan in .omo/ulw-loop/019f551c-50df-7c70-a662-c22307f2f4f3/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omo/ulw-loop/019f551c-50df-7c70-a662-c22307f2f4f3/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.
